title: Kerala Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Kerala Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Kerala Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kerala Tourism:
Kerala Tourism is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kerala Tourism!
